description: A definition of a list and/or info view

oneOf.description: Needed to pass (kind, api_family) == ('', '') which is used to fetch (kind, api_family) from the source
The API belongs to the core API

default.description: The fallback to use if no data is available

field.description: A name of a field in a row or column

field_colors.description: Colours to use when outputting the field

items.description: [context]/type lookup to a fg/bg pair in the theme file

context.description: The context for the the colour pair

type.description: The name of the colour pair

items.description: context/type lookup to a fg/bg pair in the theme file

context.description: The context for the the colour pair

type.description: The name of the colour pair

fields.description: A list of fields to display

sortorder_reverse.description: Should the list default to reversed sort order

fallback_on_empty.description: Normally an existing, but empty, field is treated as valid; this option allows for using the fallback path if the field is empty

generator.description: Custom generator to use when formatting the data

field_separators.description: Separators to use between items in a field

items.description: [context]/type lookup to a separator in the theme file

formatting.description: Formatting to use when outputting a field

anyOf.description: Substitute the value with a boolean
Substitute the value with an integer
Substitute the value with a string
A ThemeRef(context, type) or ThemeString(string, ThemeAttr(context, type))

header.description: A header to use for fields

itemgetter_source.description: Is the data source the selected object or the parent object; default: object

on_activation.description: Action to perform when activating an entry

path_data_type.description: A data type as used by path/paths

action.description: An action to perform on the list of output; 'sum' adds values (only works on type: [int, float]), 'earliest'/'latest' returns the newest/oldest timestamp (only works on type: timestamp)

default.description: The fallback value to use if no data is available

else.description: This value is used if a when-clause evaluates to false

fallback_on_empty.description: Normally an existing, but empty, field is treated as valid; this option allows for using the fallback path if the field is empty

key.description: Used in conjunction with pathtype 'key_value' to transform the key of a key/value pairs

regex.description: A list of regular expressions to match against when doing the substitution

limit.description: Number of results to return from the path lookup

lookup.description: Used to populate a status tuple by making a Kubernetes lookup

ok.description: Used when the lookup is successful

none_str_as_none.description: By default the string None is treated as any other string; if this is true it's instead treated as null

anyOf.description: Literal string to return as if it were the result from a lookup

prefix.description: A prefix or list of prefixes to add before the output

regex.description: Regular expression to process data; used when pathtype is regex

subpaths.description: Fields to fetch within a dict path

anyOf.description: A field name to fetch, or for dictfields a literal string
For dictfields a field name to fetch
A field object with post processing

regex.description: A list of regular expression filters

substitute.description: Substitute the value of the output for this string; typically used with when-conditions

anyOf.description: Substitute the value with a string
Substitute the value with an integer
Substitute the value with a boolean

subtype.description: Certain pathtypes can have a subtype that modifies their behaviour

suffix.description: A suffix or list of suffixes to add after the output

groups.description: A list of order of the regex capture groups

join.description: Separators to use when joining elements

groups.description: A list of order of the regex capture groups

join.description: Separators to use when joining elements

output.description: What should the output field(s) be named

anyOf.description: An array of data types

value.description: Used in conjunction with pathtype 'key_value' to transform the value of a key/value pairs

path_with_fallback.description: The path to get the information from, optionally with fallback

processed_data_type.description: The type of data after processing

row_header.description: A header to use for rows

prefixItems.description: formatting to use for the string fragment

selector.description: The selector or selector component (used with get_kubernetes_objects)

anyOf.description: Literal string to return as if it were the result from a lookup

view_name.description: The name of a view, as used from the command line; view names starting with __ are skipped

when.description: Conditional; only include path elements that match the specified when condition(s)

none.description: Check whether key has a value

notnone.description: Check whether key lacks a value

ne.description: Negative exact match against this value

lte.description: Less than or equal to this value

gte.description: Greater than or equal to this value

notstartswith.description: Value does not start with this string

notendswith.description: Value does not end with this string

in.description: Match against any of these values

notin.description: Negative match against any of these values

missing.description: The key is missing from the object

notmissing.description: The key exists in the object

notisdict.description: Is the value a not dict

dicthaskey.description: Is key a member of the dict

notdicthaskey.description: Is key not a member of the dict

api_family.description: The Kubernetes API family the view is associated with

listview.description: A view used to list objects

actions.description: Actions that can be performed on the selected list entry or on all tagged list entries
